---
name: Docs or workbench improvement
about: Suggest a clarity, usability, or structure improvement
labels: documentation
---

## Area

- [ ] README or public-facing docs
- [ ] reviewer-facing docs
- [ ] workbench interaction or layout
- [ ] theorem-to-app mapping
- [ ] examples or exports

## Current problem

What feels unclear, incomplete, or misleading?

## Suggested improvement

Describe the change you think would help.

## Why it matters

Who would benefit from this change? For example: contributor, reviewer, reader, or workbench user.

## Relevant files

List any files or modules if you know them.
